prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约17968→21536→25093→34252→31807名，整体呈明显后移趋势，2024年骤降至34252名后2025年小幅回升至31807名，近5年累计后移约13839名；2025年基准位次约31807名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年243人、2022年244人、2023年235人、2024年235人、2025年230人，2026年计划250人，较2025年增加20人，扩幅约8.7%，扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第89名，近年排名在84–92名区间波动，整体稳定；该校在声誉评价文件中未被提及，近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第83位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量中等，主要提及“实力大于名气，严重被低估的211”，整体声誉平稳；第五轮学科评估中交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A类学科，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通工程、交通运输等招生专业高度关联，在交通基建领域有较强行业认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，长安大学在上述领域均有招生，对考生有一定吸引力；河北省2026年高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（606754人）微增约3000人，物理类考生估算约364660人，较2025年（363040人）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；长安大学位于陕西省西安市，属西北地区；河北省考生对省外211高校报考意愿整体平稳，该校在河北省招生规模较大（物理类250人），属于在冀招生较多的省外211之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招20人（+8.7%）对竞争的缓解作用、考生总数微增带来的小幅竞争加剧、以及学校声誉平稳无负面舆情等因素，在2025年基准31807名基础上，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大）；预测最低位次约33417名，区间32917–33917名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17968 → 21536 → 25093 → 34252 → 31807, showing a clear backward trend overall. In 2024, it dropped sharply to 34252, then slightly recovered to 31807 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13839 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 31807. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 243 in 2021, 244 in 2022, 235 in 2023, 235 in 2024, and 230 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 250, an increase of 20 from 2025, an expansion of about 8.7%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 89th in 2026, fluctuating between 84th and 92nd in recent years, overall stable. The university is not mentioned in reputation evaluation documents, and there have been no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 83rd overall, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, mainly mentioned as 'stronger than its reputation, a severely underestimated 211', maintaining a stable reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A-class discipline, highly correlated with enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, and Transportation, with strong industry recognition in the transportation infrastructure field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular in society. Chang'an University enrolls in these fields, attracting some candidates. The total number of Hebei Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase of about 3,000 from 2025 (606,754). Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 364,660, slightly up from 2025 (363,040), leading to a minor increase in competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, in the Northwest region. Hebei candidates' willingness to apply to out-of-province 211 universities is generally stable. The university has a large enrollment scale in Hebei (250 for Physics Category), making it one of the out-of-province 211 universities with higher enrollment in Hebei.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the mitigating effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of 20 (+8.7%) on competition, the slight increase in competition due to a minor rise in total candidates, and the stable reputation without negative public opinion, based on the 2025 baseline of 31807, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 33417, with a range of 32917–33917.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 32917–33917, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Vehicle, Automation) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Huawei Class, Computer, Electronic Information, Electrical) as a sprint option, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Architecture, Materials, etc.) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 32000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors for stability.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 89th in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years; its reputation is stable with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Transportation Engineering A- is its only A-class discipline, which has no direct disciplinary connection with History Category enrollment majors (Administrative Management, Ideological and Political Education, Journalism and Communication, English, etc.), so the driving effect of advantageous disciplines on the application for liberal arts majors is limited.

专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors mainly include Administrative Management, Ideological and Political Education, Journalism and Communication, and English, among which Journalism and Communication has obvious social discouragement, English/Foreign Languages are generally wait-and-see, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is relatively cold; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 245,140, a slight increase of about 1,426 from 2025 (243,714), leading to a small increase in competition; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, in the Northwest region; the number of History Category enrollments is small (12), and the scale of liberal arts enrollment in Hebei is not large.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction of 5 enrollments (-29.4%) in 2026 leading to notably intensified competition, a slight increase in History Category examinees, and the overall cold social popularity of liberal arts majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 4170, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to shift significantly forward (ranking number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 3384, with a range of 2884–3884.
